title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.523 - Irwin C. Cudworth Memorial Bridge designated on Highway CC in Ozark County
text:
227.523.  Irwin C. Cudworth Memorial Bridge designated on Highway CC in Ozark County. — The bridge on Highway CC crossing over North Fork White River in Ozark County shall be designated the "Irwin C. Cudworth Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs of such designation to be paid for by private donations.
(L. 2015 H.B. 522, et al. merged with S.B. 156)
